Package de.tsenger.androsmex.mrtd

Encapsulates MRTD (Machine Readable Travel Documents) data type that the DNIe v3.0 handles (name, surname, date of birth, picture, handwritten signature, etc.)

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    DG1_Dnie
    Main class for DNIe v3.0 data encapsulation.
    DG11
    Class for DNIe v3.0 address data encapsulation.
    DG13
    Class for DNIe v3.0 extended data encapsulation.
    DG2
    Class for DNIe v3.0 biometric data encapsulation.
    DG7
    Class for DNIe v3.0 handwritten signature data encapsulation.
    EF_COM
    Class for DNIe v3.0 ICAO LDS (Logical Data Structure) and Unicode version data encapsulation.

Package de.tsenger.androsmex.mrtd Description

Encapsulates MRTD (Machine Readable Travel Documents) data type that the DNIe v3.0 handles (name, surname, date of birth, picture, handwritten signature, etc.)
